ddls:
CREATE TABLE "accounts" (
  "account_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each account */,
  "account_number" TEXT /* Bank account number */,
  "account_holder_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the account holder */,
  "account_type" TEXT /* Type of account (e.g., savings, checking) */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the account was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the account (e.g., active, closed) */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the account */,
  "branch_id" INTEGER /* Branch of the bank where the account is held */,
  "opening_balance" REAL /* Initial balance of the account */,
  "last_transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the last transaction on the account */,
  "last_transaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the last transaction on the account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("account_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_accounts_account_holder_id FOREIGN KEY ("account_holder_id") REFERENCES account_holders ("account_holder_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "account_holders" (
  "account_holder_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each account holder */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the account holder */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the account holder */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the account holder */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the account holder */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the account holder */,
  "identification_type" TEXT /* Type of identification provided by the account holder */,
  "identification_number" TEXT /* Identification number of the account holder */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("account_holder_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "account_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the account involved in the transaction */,
  "reference" INTEGER /* Reference number for the transaction */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the transaction */,
  "start_balance" REAL /* Starting balance before the transaction */,
  "mutation" REAL /* Amount of the transaction (positive for deposits, negative for withdrawals) */,
  "end_balance" REAL /* Ending balance after the transaction */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the transaction category */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the transaction type */,
  "transaction_status" TEXT /* Status of the transaction */,
  "transaction_reference" TEXT /* Reference for the transaction */,
  "transaction_description" TEXT /* Description of the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_account_id FOREIGN KEY ("account_id") REFERENCES accounts ("account_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES transaction_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES transaction_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the transaction category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the transaction category */,
  "category_code" TEXT /* Unique code for the transaction category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the transaction type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the transaction type */,
  "type_code" TEXT /* Unique code for the transaction type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_details" (
  "detail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction detail */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the transaction */,
  "recipient" TEXT /* Recipient of the transaction (if applicable) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the transaction (if applicable) */,
  "additional_info" TEXT /* Additional information about the transaction */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used for the transaction */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date of payment for the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("detail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_details_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES transactions ("transaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Employee ID of the user (if applicable) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "account_id" INTEGER /* ID of the account accessed */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transaction accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Level of access granted to the user */,
  "additional_info" TEXT /* Additional information related to the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES transactions ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_account_id FOREIGN KEY ("account_id") REFERENCES accounts ("account_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trail" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log entry */,
  "table_name" TEXT /* Name of the table where the change occurred */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the record that was changed */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., insert, update, delete) */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date of the action */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "old_value" TEXT /* Old value of the changed field */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value of the changed field */,
  "action_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the action */,
  "additional_info" TEXT /* Additional information related to the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trail_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "role_permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role in a structured format */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
